description: A 'make X required when Y' intent maps to VALIDATE_EXPRESSION → fd:validate, not fd:visible (which controls visibility) or fd:enabled (which controls editability).
userMessage: On the contact us form at /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1, make the address field required when full_name is filled

rubric.description: The patch op targets fd:validate (or a required constraint inside fd:rules) on the address field — NOT fd:visible or fd:enabled. 'Make required when' is a validation constraint, not a visibility or access rule.
The validation condition references the full_name field's qualified id (e.g. $form.full_name) to check whether it is filled/non-empty
The patch operation targets the address field's pointer, not full_name
